creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I like Perl 4.  However, your offer to veryify all FreeBSd system perl4 
scripts as working under perl5 is admirable.  Unfortunately, the real 
work in getting Perl 5 on FreeBSD is involved in cutting it up and suiting 
it to our source tree.  If you are still interested, send mail saying such 
to hackers@FreeBSD.ORG.  You will be granted immediate attention, since 
there are many who would like someone to do this work for them.
